extortion.description: At 3P we have a PASSION for PEOPLE to PROSPER.We take a powerful, relationship-based approach from the top to the bottom of each of the 3P service delivery pillars. The 3P service-delivery vision, intention, strategy and ideology are bolted, ready to power our passion for people to prosper.Soon you will see the launch of a broad offering ranging from financial services to legal to accounting to property investment in Melbourne with an aggressive growth plan for other parts of Australia.It’s a game changer; it’s a deliberate strategy to create prosperity financially and in other aspects of life!- Database- Financial documents- Personal information of employees and clients https://3pcorp.com.au/
